data: James Otis Law Group, LLC, Single Member LLC
The value reflects an estimated valuation of the James Otis Law Group, LLC.
James Otis Law Group, LLC (law firm) anticipated LLC distribution
I continue to participate in this defined contribution benefit plan.  The plan sponsor ceased making contributions at my separation. (2017-01-01)

Before confirmation, my single-member LLC law firm will be sold to two other attorneys who currently work with the firm.  As part of the sale, I will transfer my interest in all outstanding client fees to the new owners before I enter government service.  I will receive my outstanding LLC distribution before entering government service or I will forfeit this distribution. (2025-03-01)
